title: Lamb ribs in the oven
excerpt: Amanda loved the lamb ribs so much that she flew home with a takeaway pack. I think the person sitting next to her on the plane must have wondered about the delicious smell coming from her handbag.

seo.title: Lamb ribs in the oven - Marinda Kook

html: Amanda loved the lamb ribs so much that she flew home with a takeaway pack .  I think the person sitting next to her on the plane must have wondered about the delicious smell coming from her handbag.

ingredientGroups.title: Ingredients for the initial simmer until just soft
items: a few pieces of fresh ginger, peeled and sliced

steps: Mix all the ingredients together and cook for one hour until the meat just starts to become soft.
Drain and set the ribs aside.
Mix all the marinade ingredients together.
Put the ribs into the marinade and leave to marinate overnight, or for at least 2 hours.
Put the ribs with the marinade into an oven pan.
Bake the ribs until soft and until the sauce turns sticky.
